identifier.description: Canonical function identifier. AWS: Lambda ARN (arn:aws:lambda:{region}:{account}:function:{name}). GCP Cloud Run: projects/{project}/locations/{location}/services/{name} (or full service URL). Azure Function: /subscriptions/{sub}/resourceGroups/{rg}/providers/Microsoft.Web/sites/{app}/functions/{func} (must include leading '/').

payload_json.description: Raw JSON payload string sent to the function.
